mapper.select: select s.*, o.order_no from chat_session s left join demo_order o on s.order_id=o.id where s.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into chat_session(session_no, user_id, order_id, title, channel, status, current_intent, summary) values(#{sessionNo}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{title}, coalesce(#{channel}, 'WEB'), coalesce(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), #{currentIntent}, #{summary})
mapper.update: update chat_session set status='CLOSED', closed_at=now() where id=#{id}
update chat_session set order_id=#{orderId} where id=#{id}
update chat_session set current_intent=#{intentCode}, summary=#{summary}, updated_at=now() where id=#{id}
